prompt: Create a warm, cozy anime-style illustration of a cheerful anthropomorphic calico cat person enjoying a lazy holiday afternoon in a sunlit bedroom. The character is reclining diagonally across a soft cream-colored bed, wearing a plain white T-shirt and loose gray sweatpants with a drawstring, round wire-rim glasses, smiling with closed happy eyes, one arm tucked behind the head and the other holding a foamy glass of golden beer. Add a striped calico tail curled on the bed, visible paw pads on the feet, soft blush, and relaxed body language. The room should feel peaceful and lived-in, with golden sunlight streaming through a large open window on the left, white curtains, blue sky and fluffy clouds outside, and leafy green plants on the windowsill and in the foreground. Include exactly two pillows behind the character, one mustard yellow and one green gingham, plus cream bedding and a rounded wooden headboard. On the wall above the bed, include exactly three wall decorations: a cat poster reading GOOD DAY, a small hanging sign reading "Relax" with a paw print, and a framed landscape picture. On the wall shelf to the upper right, include exactly five visible items: one potted trailing plant, one cat-face plush or ornament, two upright books, and one framed landscape photo. Add a bedside table on the right with a lamp, a small alarm clock, and a cup; place one open beverage can on the bed near the character. In the foreground, include a low table with a mug of tea and a magazine titled NEKO LIFE featuring a cat illustration, plus a small potted plant. Use soft painterly shading, gentle linework, warm beige and honey tones, detailed cozy clutter, dappled sunlight, and a relaxing slice-of-life mood.
